rulings.Case Title: IN RE: DAVID L. K. HUANG REVOCABLE TRUST UTD, 09/14/2016
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #5, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/17/25. Examiner's Notes emailed to attorney with the following issues: 1) The bond calculation still appears incorrect. Only the probable annual income of the trust should be included; one-time receipts (e.g. the $400K received from the refinance on 10/5/21) should not be included. An ex parte petition to increase bond must also be filed, approved, and additional bond filed prior to the accounting being granted. 2) Trustee alleges that she encumbered the real property further and obtained an additional ~$400K cash out. Please provide the terms of that loan. 3) Re: 2-8 Lobos Ave: Petitioner alleges that $47,664 was paid to Gary Liu Construction Inc., however, the translated contract does not identify the contractor, and the payees on the accounting are identified as "Zhuo Jun Zhu" or "Zhuo Feng" or "Dayang SITU". Please provide proof of payment of $47,664 to Gary Liu Construction Inc. In addition, no substantiation has been provided for the other > $1,000 expenses. Note: invoices from East Star Building Supply are attached, but the accounting does not list East Star as a payee, and none of the invoice amounts match the amounts in the accounting. 4) Re: "Other Disbursements" a. Petitioner alleges that $200 and $2,621.13 credit cards payments were for trust expenses, but the trust expenses are not itemized. b. Please further explain the $235.08 charge to New York Life and why there was a service charge on a product that was not purchased.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CECIE WEST
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/9/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been lodged or received yet by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) No proof of service of the Notice of Petition to Administer Estate has been filed. (3) The notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as information about remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (4) The Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code Section 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed separately and confidentially with a cover sheet. (5) What are the dates of death of the deceased issue? [LRSF 14.18 C.] (6) The court records indicate that there was another daughter, who post-deceased. Please provide the assigned examiner a proposed order and courtesy copies of the petition and any papers filed to address these issues by 6/25/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MONIO PILPEL
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Issues to be addressed at hearing: 1) Petitioner requests an order from this court passing decedent's community property interest to petitioner and confirming petitioner's community property interest for the bank accounts, but decedent's will leaves all of his property to the Trustee of the Pilpel Family Trust. 2) A copy of a statement for a period including the date of death must be filed for any financial account (LRSF 14.26.A). 3) Form DE-226 is the mandatory Judicial Council form required for the order. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE IN RE THE GLADYS BENWARD LIVING TRUST, DATED MARCH TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Beneficiary Michelle Nemoit'S Petition (1)To Compel Accounting (2)Demand Information; And (3) To Restrain Trustee From Using Trust Assets To Defend L
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/9/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proposed order has been lodged or received by the assigned examiner. [LRSF 14.7 A. and 14.59 E.] (2) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.] (3) Notice may not be given in care of another unless the person entitled to notice is an adult and has directed in writing that notice be given to that other person. [CRC 7.51(a).] (4) Notice does not appear to have been given to Michelle Benoit. (5) When did Kristine Knockum die? (6) The copy of the trust attached to the petition is not an executed document. Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of the petition and any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 6/25/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOHN DAVID PFISTER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/17/25. Examiner's Notes sent to counsel with the following issues: 1) The following have not been filed: a. DE-147 b. DE-147S c. Proposed order 2) When second generation or more distant heirs are listed, the deceased ancestors through whom they take (or would have taken) must be named and their relationships to the decedent and dates of deaths need to be stated [Local Rule 14.18C]. The waivers of bond and notice will be reviewed once this information is provided. 3) Item 6 of the petition is incorrect, as nieces and nephews are listed. Please read the directions carefully and choose the first box that applies.
